queries.question: For each airport, show the facilities that they offer.
queries.sql: select airports.name , facilities.type from Airports_Facilities join Facilities on Airports_Facilities.FacilityID = Facilities.FacilityID join Airports on Airports_Facilities.AirportID = Airports.AirportID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?airports_facilities a :Airports_Facilities .
  ?facilities a :Facilities .
  ?airports_facilities p:hasFacilities ?facilities .
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airports_facilities p:hasAirports ?airports .
  ?airports p:name ?name .
  ?facilities p:Type ?type .
}

queries.question: Which facilities are common to all airports?
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.Type  from Airports_Facilities join Facilities on Airports_Facilities.FacilityID = Facilities.FacilityID join Airports on Airports_Facilities.AirportID = Airports.AirportID   GROUP BY Airports_Facilities.FacilityID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Airports_Facilities.AirportID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Airports)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the facilities that all airports offer.
